retry_reason: The operation always succeeds; there is no failure condition to retry.
contract_summary: This is a get wrapper for the arena VMA object (vml) that is called when a VMA is opened (e.g., on fork or mmap). It increments the mmap_count refcount of the vml object. The caller (VMA subsystem) holds a reference on behalf of the mapping; the corresponding release must occur in arena_vm_close which decrements the refcount and potentially frees the object when the last mapping is closed. The caller does not need to check the return value as the operation is unconditional and always succeeds.

judge.reason: The function's sole purpose is to increment the mmap_count refcount of the vml object via refcount_inc. No other logic is present.
